description: A GIS technologist needs to serve Natural Earth country boundaries in Web Mercator projection (EPSG:3857) for a web mapping application. Create a new layer named 'ne_countries_3857' in the 'ne' workspace using the 'postgis_ne' data store and the 'ne_countries' PostGIS table. The layer must be reprojected from its native EPSG:4326 to a declared EPSG:3857. Set the title to 'Natural Earth Countries (Web Mercator)' and ensure bounding boxes are computed. The original 'ne_countries' layer must remain unchanged. GeoServer is at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/ with credentials admin / Admin123!.
